creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Joseph,

Thanks for working on it. I didn't realize Emacs 24.4 is out, yay!! :)

There are couple of issues with your diff, the ones which I could find in first glance without compiling:

- PORTREVISION, PORTEPOCH 
- CANNA patchset
- /var/games/emacs

Since your patch is quite big, I'll work on it during weekend, and hopefully commit it (with changes).

Thanks
Ashish
